message:
fix(bubbles): refactor list pagination to use fixed chrome line counting

Replace dynamic lipgloss height measurements with deterministic chrome
line counting for pagination calculations, making behavior predictable
and test-friendly.

- Remove lipgloss::height import (no longer needed for chrome measurement)
- Track chrome_lines as a usize counter: title/filter, status, pagination,
  and help each contribute 1 line when visible
- Final available height: self.height.saturating_sub(chrome_lines)
- Clone existing paginator instead of creating new one (preserves state)
- Update test_cancel_filter_resets_pagination: height 6 → 10
- Update test_per_page_calculation and test_total_pages_calculation to use
  custom delegates with explicit height=1, spacing=0, description=false
  for deterministic arithmetic

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
